zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Warde於1287年出生在英國越可爾吉賽利時，她的父親Sir Simon Warde20歲，母親Claris21歲。她於1326年與John Scott de Calverley, II在英國越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1362年9月7日在英國賀福爾賀福德享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna Warde于1287年出生在英国越可爾吉賽利时，她的父亲Sir Simon Warde20岁，母亲Claris21岁。她于1326年与John Scott de Calverley, II在英国越可爾約克结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1362年9月7日在英国賀福爾賀福德享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Warde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Donal.

variants.name: Ward
meanings: English: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Middle English ward ‘watchman, guard’ (Old English weard, used as both an agent noun and an abstract noun).
English: occupational name from Middle English warde ‘armed guard’ (Old English weard ‘watching, guarding’), with the same meaning as 1 above.

Irish: shortened form of McWard, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Bhaird ‘son of the poet’. The surname occurs throughout Ireland, where three different branches of the family are known as professional poets.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Warde was born in 1287, in Guiseley, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Simon Warde, was 20 and her mother, Claris, was 21. She married John Scott de Calverley, II in 1326, in York, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 7 September 1362, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Warde est née en 1287, à Guiseley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Simon Warde, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Claris, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Scott de Calverley, II en 1326, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 septembre 1362, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanna Warde 1287 in Guiseley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Simon Warde 20 und ihre Mutter Claris 21. Sie hat 1326 in York, Yorkshire, England John Scott de Calverley, II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. September 1362 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Hereford, Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Warde è nata il nel 1287 nel Guiseley, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Simon Warde, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Claris, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John Scott de Calverley, II nel 1326, nel York, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 7 settembre 1362, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Wardeが1287年にイギリスヨークシュアイアグイセリーで生まれた時，父Sir Simon Wardeは20歳，母Clarisは21歳であった。1326年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークでJohn Scott de Calverley, IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1362年9月7日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Warde(이)가 1287년 영국 요르크실르 길즈리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Simon Warde(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Claris(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1326년 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 John Scott de Calverley, II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1362년 9월 7일 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Warde nasceu em 1287, em Guiseley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Simon Warde, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Claris, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John Scott de Calverley, II em 1326, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1362, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Warde родилась в 1287 г. в местности гуисели, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Simon Warde было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Claris, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Scott de Calverley, II в 1326 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 7 сентября 1362 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna Warde nació en 1287, en Guiseley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Simon Warde, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Claris, tenía 21 años. Se casó con John Scott de Calverley, II en 1326, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1362, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años.
